prompt: This code throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. What is the bug?
choices: int[] cannot be indexed with a variable expression
Array indices go from 0 to length-1; data[data.length] is data[3] which is out of bounds
data.length returns the wrong value for arrays declared with initializers
System.out.println cannot print int values directly
explanation: For an array of length 3, valid indices are 0, 1, 2. data[data.length] = data[3] is one past the last element, throwing ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fix: data[data.length - 1].
